articles.title: OPENAI ANNOUNCES FIRST PARTNERSHIP WITH A UNIVERSITY
articles.summary: OpenAI has announced its first partnership with a higher education institution, Arizona State University, which will gain full access to ChatGPT Enterprise for coursework, tutoring, research, and more, including building a personalized AI tutor and creative AI avatars for students.

articles.title: MARK ZUCKERBERG’S NEW GOAL IS CREATING AGI
articles.summary: Mark Zuckerberg, Meta's CEO, is entering the race to develop artificial general intelligence (AGI), aiming to enhance Meta's apps and user experience. He emphasizes the need for AI talent and computing power and is considering an open-source approach to AI development, contrasting with the more closed methods of other companies.

articles.title: FOUNDATIONS OF VECTOR RETRIEVAL (2 HOUR READ)
articles.summary: This massive document outlines essentially everything one would need to know about the state of the vector retrieval field. It is a valuable resource that will take some time to dig through.

articles.title: PRETRAINING OF LARGE IMAGE MODELS
articles.summary: Apple has released a great paper on pretraining image models with an autoregressive loss. It measures scaling behavior and finds that like in language, these large unsupervised image models have very predictable behavior.

articles.title: TEXT-TO-IMAGE EDITING
articles.summary: This paper improves how images are edited using natural language instructions by tackling challenges like unclear instructions and identifying specific parts of the image to edit.

articles.title: 🆕 MOCKGPT: SIMULATE THE OPENAI API FOR TESTING AND DEVELOPMENT
articles.summary: Developing against OpenAI APIs can be finicky and expensive. MockGPT by WireMock [10] is a readymade mock API for ChatGPT, GPT-3.5, etc. Use it to write and test your code without fees and frustrating wait times — and switch one line of code to go live with the real API.

articles.title: Read the blog [10] or use MockGPT for free
3D OBJECT PLACEMENT IN IMAGE GENERATION
articles.summary: Compose and Conquer introduces a conditional diffusion model that excels in placing objects in three-dimensional space within generated images.

articles.title: MINUTE-LEVEL VIDEO BLOG CREATION
articles.summary: Vlogger is an advanced AI system capable of generating minute-long video blogs (vlogs) from user descriptions. Vlogger operates in four stages - Script, Actor, ShowMaker, and Voicer, each representing a specific aspect of vlog creation.

articles.title: INSTANCE SEGMENTATION FOR NOVEL OBJECTS
articles.summary: This project evaluates the generalization capabilities of deep learning models for instance segmentation to novel objects.

articles.title: 8BIT HIPPO ATTENTION MAY BE 3X FASTER THAN FLASH ATTENTION V2
articles.summary: A quantization-aware attention alternative that speeds up inference substantially over some state-of-the-art implementations. Its creators also claim 700 TFLOPs on MI-300X. The details are sparse, but it would be quite an achievement if so.

articles.title: MEGA DOLPHIN PASS THROUGH MERGE
articles.summary: Dolphin is widely considered to be one of the strongest uncensored open models available. It is mainly built on Mixtral. This 120B model was made by merging two smaller Dolphin models together. It has been found, with Goliath 120B, that this merging process can improve overall model performance.

articles.title: NEW BENCHMARK FOR CODE GENERATION
articles.summary: TACO is a new benchmark for assessing a system’s ability to generate code. It is substantially larger than existing datasets and contains more challenging problems. On easy problems, GPT-4 gets 30% correct, while it only achieves 2% on the hardest subset of questions.

articles.title: MICROSOFT MAKES ITS AI-POWERED READING TUTOR FREE
articles.summary: Microsoft has launched Reading Coach, an AI-powered tool designed to provide personalized reading practice available at no cost for anyone with a Microsoft account.

articles.title: FINE-TUNING MIXTRAL WITH GPT-4
articles.summary: A handy trick to quickly lower your AI cost.

articles.title: OUSTED TWITTER CEO PARAG AGRAWAL IS BACK WITH AN AI STARTUP
articles.summary: Twitter’s former CTO and interim CEO Parag Agrawal has launched his own AI startups. These startups have received funding from some big-name VCs like Khosla Ventures.
